name: Crustless Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 package Bacon, cooked crisp and crumbled (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a small saucepan.
2. Add flour to the melted butter and cook until smooth; set aside.
3. Beat eggs and add milk, Monterey Jack cheese, cream cheese, and cottage cheese to the egg mixture.
4. Stir in baking powder, salt, sugar, and the butter-flour mixture into the egg mixture until well blended.
5. Pour the batter into a well-greased 9x13x2-inch pan.
6. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
Preparation time: 15 minutes
Baking time: 45 minutes
